input_text: Sekolah anak aku ni cikgu dia semua lembab. Nak ajar BM pun tak betul, patut la budak-budak tak reti eja.
reason: Dismissive insult towards teachers as slow/incompetent. Parent frustration expressed through rude personal attacks on educators.
suggested_rewrite: Cikgu di sekolah anak saya mungkin perlu sokongan tambahan dalam pengajaran BM. Harap kualiti boleh dipertingkatkan.

input_text: JPJ office tu memang sarang pemalas. Pergi pukul 8 nombor giliran dah habis, staff mana entah hilang.
reason: Calls government office staff lazy. Sarcastic and dismissive rant about public service bureaucracy.
suggested_rewrite: Pejabat JPJ perlu tambah baik sistem giliran dan pastikan staf mencukupi pada waktu puncak.

input_text: Jiran sebelah ni memang tak ada adab, letak kasut depan pintu sampai bersepah macam kedai bundle.
reason: Rude insult about neighbor's cleanliness habits. Dismissive comparison meant to shame.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran sebelah selalu letak kasut banyak depan pintu, harap boleh kemas sedikit demi kebersihan bersama.

input_text: Parking lot condo aku ni macam hutan rimba. Orang double park suka hati, management buat bodoh je.
reason: Dismissive attack on condo management for ignoring parking issues. Rude but rooted in genuine frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah double parking di condo saya serius. Harap pihak pengurusan boleh ambil tindakan tegas.

input_text: Budak accident motor tu padan muka la, dah tau jalan gelap pakai baju hitam pulak. Nak kesian pun susah.
reason: Mild victim-blaming of motorcycle accident victim. Dismissive of the victim's suffering with 'padan muka' tone.
suggested_rewrite: Kemalangan motor tu mungkin boleh dielakkan jika penunggang pakai pakaian reflektif. Harap cepat sembuh.

input_text: Anak jiran tu asik ponteng sekolah, mak bapak pun satu hal tak kisah. Jangan salahkan sekolah nanti.
reason: Gossips about neighbor's child truancy and dismissively blames parents. Passive-aggressive neighborhood commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Anak jiran saya kerap ponteng sekolah. Mungkin ibu bapa dan pihak sekolah boleh bekerjasama mencari penyelesaian.

input_text: Kerja grabfood je bangga, macam la takde kerja lain. Malu sikit la, degree pegang tapi deliver makanan.
reason: Dismissive and shaming commentary about gig economy workers. Rude attack on people's career choices.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai graduan terpaksa buat kerja gig sementara mencari peluang lain. Kita patut hargai usaha mereka.

input_text: Sekolah agama ni cikgu dia half past six. Anak aku balik rumah tak belajar apa pun, main je.
reason: Dismisses religious school teachers as incompetent with mild ethnic/religious undertone about education quality.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti pengajaran di sekolah agama anak saya perlu ditingkatkan. Anak saya rasa kurang belajar.

input_text: Pehal la kereta Myvi ni bawak macam raja jalan. Potong kanan kiri tak signal, memang dasar Myvi driver.
reason: Stereotypes Myvi drivers as reckless. Rude generalization about a group of road users.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu yang potong lane tanpa signal memang bahaya. Semua pemandu perlu ikut peraturan jalan raya.

input_text: Guard condo ni memang bodoh, visitor dah register masih nak tahan kat gate setengah jam.
reason: Calls condo security guard stupid for following procedures. Rude and dismissive of service workers.
suggested_rewrite: Guard condo lambat proses visitor walaupun sudah register. Sistem perlu diperbaiki supaya lebih lancar.

input_text: Jalan depan rumah dah berlopak macam kolam ikan, adun senyap je. Undi bagi, kerja takde.
reason: Sarcastic dismissal of elected representative for ignoring road conditions. Cynical political frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Jalan depan rumah dah rosak teruk. Harap wakil rakyat boleh beri perhatian dan uruskan pembaikan.

input_text: Makcik cleaner kat sekolah anak aku tu kerja macam takde semangat. Tandas masih kotor pukul 10 pagi.
reason: Dismissive criticism of school cleaning staff. Rude commentary about a worker's effort.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan tandas sekolah anak saya kurang memuaskan. Harap pihak sekolah pastikan jadual pembersihan dipatuhi.

input_text: Buat apa hantar anak sekolah kebangsaan, kualiti dah merudum. Baik masuk sekolah swasta je kalau mampu.
reason: Dismissive of national school quality with undertone suggesting communal educational divide. Borderline provocative.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti sekolah kebangsaan perlu ditingkatkan supaya semua ibu bapa yakin dengan sistem pendidikan negara.

input_text: Kedai makan ni memang cekik darah la harga. Nasi campur biasa pun RM12, ingat kita tanam duit ke.
reason: Rude accusation of price gouging at a restaurant. Sarcastic and emotionally charged customer complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Harga nasi campur RM12 terasa mahal berbanding porsi. Harap peniaga boleh seimbangkan harga dan kualiti.

input_text: Committee condo aku memang gila kuasa. Nak tukar lampu corridor pun kena meeting 3 kali, bajet PM la pulak.
reason: Sarcastic passive-aggressive attack on condo committee for bureaucratic slowness. Mocking comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Committee condo agak lambat buat keputusan. Tukar lampu corridor pun ambil masa lama, harap proses boleh dipercepat.

input_text: Semua salah kerajaan la kan. Tak hujan salah kerajaan, hujan banjir pun salah kerajaan. Tapi undi tetap undi.
reason: Sarcastic dismissal of political complaints while simultaneously being cynical about voting. Passive-aggressive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat sering menyalahkan kerajaan, tapi kita juga perlu bertanggungjawab dalam memilih wakil yang berkualiti.

input_text: Orang yang bagi anak bawah 12 naik motor tu memang tak sayang anak. Nanti jadi apa baru nak menyesal.
reason: Mild victim-blaming and judgmental commentary about parenting choices with implied consequences.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan kanak-kanak penting. Ibu bapa perlu pastikan anak di bawah umur tidak menunggang motosikal.

input_text: Sistem bas sekolah ni macam zaman batu. Anak kena tunggu 1 jam, driver pun malas nak tepat masa.
reason: Dismisses school bus system and rudely calls driver lazy. Frustrated parent with rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem bas sekolah perlu dipertingkatkan. Anak saya sering tunggu lama kerana bas tidak tepat masa.

input_text: Tuition center tu rompak je la. Bayar RM300 sebulan tapi result anak masih sama. Cikgu pun entah qualify ke tak.
reason: Accuses tuition center of robbery and questions teacher qualifications without evidence. Rude customer complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Tuition center ni mahal tapi result anak tak nampak improvement. Harap kualiti pengajaran boleh dikaji semula.

input_text: Pekerja kaunter pos ni satu kerja pun tak boleh buat cepat. Queue sampai luar pintu, dia borak je dengan kawan.
reason: Rude complaint about post office staff being slow and chatting instead of working. Dismissive of worker.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan di kaunter pejabat pos agak lambat hari ini. Harap pihak pengurusan boleh tingkatkan kecekapan.

input_text: Orang yang kerja jual insurance tu memang annoying gila. Mana-mana pergi mesti nak pitch, macam tak ada kerja lain.
reason: Dismissive generalization about insurance agents. Rude attack on an entire profession.
suggested_rewrite: Ejen insurans yang terlalu agresif dalam pemasaran boleh buat orang tak selesa. Pendekatan yang lebih sopan lebih berkesan.

input_text: Sekolah anak aku suruh bayar yuran tambahan lagi. Duit pokok kayu ke? Asyik kutip je tapi facility still teruk.
reason: Sarcastic and rude complaint about school fees. Frustrated parent with dismissive tone about school management.
suggested_rewrite: Sekolah anak saya minta yuran tambahan lagi tapi kemudahan masih kurang baik. Harap ketelusan dalam penggunaan dana.

input_text: Lagi best la sekarang jalan berlubang mana-mana. Bayar cukai jalan buat apa kalau jalan macam bulan.
reason: Sarcastic political frustration about road maintenance. Cynical tone directed at government spending.
suggested_rewrite: Banyak jalan berlubang yang perlu dibaiki. Harap kerajaan gunakan dana cukai jalan untuk penyelenggaraan yang lebih baik.

input_text: Neighbour kat atas flat ni jenis buang sampah dari tingkap. Perangai macam ni patut la tinggal hutan.
reason: Compares neighbor to animals for littering from window. Rude and dehumanizing casual insult.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran atas flat saya selalu buang sampah dari tingkap. Tindakan ini tak patut dan perlu dilaporkan kepada pengurusan.

input_text: Budak zaman sekarang pilih kerja macam pilih baju. Offer sikit je dah reject, konon nak high salary. Dulu mana ada macam ni.
reason: Dismissive generational commentary about young people's career expectations. Condescending and sarcastic.
suggested_rewrite: Generasi muda mempunyai jangkaan gaji yang berbeza. Majikan dan pekerja perlu cari titik persefahaman.

input_text: Accident jadi kat highway tu pun sebab perempuan tu drive sambil tengok phone. Salah sendiri la kan, lepas tu nak blame lorry driver.
reason: Victim-blaming with gendered undertone in accident. Dismissive of the driver's injuries and blames phone usage.
suggested_rewrite: Kemalangan itu mungkin berkaitan penggunaan telefon semasa memandu. Semua pemandu perlu elak gangguan demi keselamatan.

input_text: Cikgu sekolah rendah tu ajar macam robot, baca buku teks je. Gaji ribu-ribu tapi usaha takde. Kesian anak-anak kita.
reason: Dismissive comparison of teacher to robot. Rude parent criticism of teaching method and effort.
suggested_rewrite: Cikgu sekolah rendah mungkin boleh gunakan kaedah pengajaran yang lebih interaktif selain membaca buku teks.

input_text: Sekolah tu banyak sangat cuti, asyik tak masuk je. Patut la anak-anak dari sekolah jenis tu result selalu low.
reason: Implies a specific school type has too many holidays with ethnic undertone. Links school type to poor results.
suggested_rewrite: Saya rasa jadual cuti sekolah perlu diselaraskan supaya masa pengajaran mencukupi untuk semua pelajar.

input_text: Penghuni condo ni buang sampah kat chute pun tak reti. Bau busuk satu level, management relax je.
reason: Insults condo residents for poor rubbish disposal and dismisses management as uncaring. Rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: Ada penghuni yang tidak buang sampah dengan betul di chute. Harap management boleh beri peringatan dan pastikan kebersihan.

input_text: Ini sekolah anak I tau, cikgu datang lambat tapi kita lambat 5 minit kena denda. Double standard betul.
reason: Accuses school of double standards. Sarcastic parent complaint about teacher punctuality vs student discipline.
suggested_rewrite: Sekolah anak saya perlu konsisten dalam peraturan masa. Guru dan pelajar sama-sama patut dipertanggungjawabkan.

input_text: Anak orang kaya confirm masuk sekolah top la. Kita orang biasa, pandai macam mana pun tak guna kalau tak ada cable.
reason: Cynical claim that school admission is based on wealth and connections. Dismissive and resentful tone about education system.
suggested_rewrite: Kemasukan ke sekolah terkemuka perlu berdasarkan merit. Sistem yang telus penting supaya semua pelajar dapat peluang sama rata.

input_text: Liftman condo tu asyik bau rokok. Dah la lift sempit, dia hisap rokok depan kita. Management buat tak nampak je.
reason: Rude complaint about condo staff smoking in elevator. Passive-aggressive about management inaction.
suggested_rewrite: Ada staf condo yang merokok berhampiran lif. Harap management boleh tegakkan polisi larangan merokok.

input_text: Jalan kat KL ni memang sumpah sesak. Government cakap nak improve public transport dari zaman dulu lagi. Cakap je pandai.
reason: Sarcastic dismissal of government public transport promises. Cynical political frustration about traffic.
suggested_rewrite: Kesesakan lalu lintas di KL masih teruk. Harap kerajaan percepat pembangunan pengangkutan awam yang lebih baik.

input_text: Orang accident sebab bawak laju, lepas tu family nak salahkan kerajaan jalan tak elok. Mana logik?
reason: Victim-blaming of accident victim's family for blaming government. Dismissive and insensitive commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Punca kemalangan perlu disiasat dari semua sudut termasuk kelajuan dan keadaan jalan. Semua pihak perlu bertanggungjawab.

input_text: Delivery abang tu hantar food lambat 1 jam, dah la nasi dah sejuk. Lepas tu minta 5 star rating. Muka tembok betul.
reason: Calls delivery rider shameless for requesting good rating after late delivery. Rude personal insult.
suggested_rewrite: Penghantar makanan lambat 1 jam dan makanan dah sejuk. Saya beri rating mengikut pengalaman sebenar.

input_text: This school ah, every week got different program, homework also not much but fees keep going up. What are they teaching?
reason: Dismissive sarcastic complaint about school activities and fees. Questions teaching quality rudely.
suggested_rewrite: My child's school has many programs but academic homework seems insufficient. I'd like to understand how fees are being utilised.

input_text: Government servant mentality la these people. Come at 9, disappear at 10 for breakfast, come back 11 then lunch at 12. What work?
reason: Stereotypes all government servants as lazy. Rude generalization mocking public sector work ethic.
suggested_rewrite: Some government offices could improve productivity by better managing break times and ensuring counter services are efficient.

input_text: Wah the grab driver took the longest route somemore want 5 star rating. Scam artist la basically.
reason: Accuses Grab driver of scamming by taking long route. Rude customer complaint with unverified accusation.
suggested_rewrite: My Grab driver seemed to take a longer route than necessary. I've reported it through the app for review.

input_text: People who study art or music, then complain no job. Like hello, what did you expect? Should have picked something useful.
reason: Dismissive and condescending commentary about arts graduates' career prospects. Rude victim-blaming tone.
suggested_rewrite: Arts and music graduates face a challenging job market. More career guidance during university could help with expectations.

input_text: This condo management is a joke la. Maintenance fee go up but lift still broken for 2 weeks. Where the money go?
reason: Sarcastic attack on condo management implying misuse of funds. Rude but rooted in genuine frustration.
suggested_rewrite: The condo maintenance fee increased but the lift has been broken for 2 weeks. Management should provide transparency on spending.

input_text: The accident victim also got fault la, who ask you to jaywalk at night wearing dark clothes. Common sense where?
reason: Victim-blaming in accident context. Dismissive of victim's suffering with condescending 'common sense' remark.
suggested_rewrite: Pedestrian safety is important. Wearing visible clothing at night and using crossings can help prevent accidents.

input_text: My kid's teacher cannot even speak proper English but teaching English class. No wonder la our education system like that.
reason: Rude attack on teacher's English proficiency. Dismissive parent complaint that generalizes to entire education system.
suggested_rewrite: I'm concerned about the English proficiency of my child's English teacher. I hope the school can ensure teachers meet language standards.

input_text: Parking attendant at the mall acted like he owns the place. So rude, pointing and shouting like we are his servant.
reason: Rude complaint about parking attendant's behavior. Exaggerated and emotionally charged service complaint.
suggested_rewrite: The parking attendant at the mall was quite aggressive in directing cars. A more polite approach would be appreciated.

input_text: These part-time workers nowadays no work ethic one. Come late, leave early, phone non-stop. Then cry when no permanent offer.
reason: Dismissive generalization about part-time workers. Condescending and judgmental about young workers' habits.
suggested_rewrite: Some part-time workers could improve their punctuality and focus. Clear expectations from employers would help.

input_text: The queue at the clinic was insane and the nurse behind the counter had zero urgency. Chit chatting like nobody waiting.
reason: Rude criticism of clinic nurse for chatting during busy hours. Frustrated patient with dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: The clinic was very busy today and service was slow. I hope staffing can be improved during peak hours.

input_text: Every time road accident, sure got people say 'padan muka'. So heartless la Malaysians sometimes.
reason: Dismissive generalization about Malaysian attitudes towards accident victims. Paints broad negative picture.
suggested_rewrite: It's concerning that some people victim-blame during road accidents. We should show more empathy and focus on road safety.

input_text: Contractor renovate my house did such a terrible job. Walls already cracking after 2 months. Confirm cut corners this fella.
reason: Accuses contractor of cutting corners. Rude personal attack based on frustration with renovation quality.
suggested_rewrite: My renovation contractor's work quality is poor. Walls are cracking after just 2 months. I need to follow up on the warranty.

input_text: Food delivery rider nearly hit my kid in the condo. These riders think they own the road, speed like crazy in residential area.
reason: Generalizes all delivery riders as reckless based on one incident. Emotionally charged but overgeneralizing.
suggested_rewrite: A delivery rider was speeding in our condo area and nearly hit my child. Speed limits in residential areas need better enforcement.

input_text: My neighbor gossip queen la, every day at the void deck talking about everyone. Got nothing better to do is it.
reason: Dismissive personal attack labeling neighbor as a gossip. Rude and condescending tone.
suggested_rewrite: My neighbor spends a lot of time chatting at the void deck. I prefer to keep my private matters to myself.

input_text: These fresh grads want RM4k starting salary but cannot even write a proper email. Delusional generation la.
reason: Dismissive generational attack on fresh graduates' salary expectations and skills. Condescending and sarcastic.
suggested_rewrite: Fresh graduates should have realistic salary expectations while employers should invest in training to bridge skill gaps.

input_text: Condo gym equipment all rosak already but management still collect gym fee. Legal robbery la this.
reason: Accuses condo management of robbery for collecting gym fees with broken equipment. Sarcastic and rude.
suggested_rewrite: The condo gym equipment needs repair but fees are still being collected. Management should address this or waive the fee temporarily.

input_text: Insurance agent friend keep pushing me to buy policy. So annoying la, friendship also become business. Like parasite only.
reason: Compares friend who sells insurance to a parasite. Rude dehumanizing language about someone's profession.
suggested_rewrite: My friend who sells insurance keeps approaching me about policies. I wish they'd respect boundaries between friendship and business.

input_text: Bus driver drove like a maniac today, everyone on the bus almost fell. These bus companies hire anyone is it?
reason: Rude complaint about bus driver with dismissive remark about hiring standards. Emotionally charged safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: The bus driver today drove recklessly and passengers felt unsafe. Bus companies should ensure proper driver training.

input_text: Aiyo this JPJ officer act like big shot la. I just ask one question also he give me attitude. Power trip much?
reason: Mocks JPJ officer for alleged rude attitude. Sarcastic dismissal of government official.
suggested_rewrite: The JPJ officer I dealt with was quite dismissive when I asked a question. Public servants should be more approachable.

input_text: My mum's condo JMB meeting always fight one. Uncle auntie shouting at each other, so embarrassing. Act like children la.
reason: Mocks condo JMB meeting participants as childish. Dismissive and condescending tone towards older residents.
suggested_rewrite: JMB meetings at my mum's condo can get quite heated. A structured format with moderation would make discussions more productive.

input_text: Why la so many people want to be YouTuber. Get a real job la. Not everyone can be famous, some of you are just cringe.
reason: Dismissive and shaming of people pursuing content creation. Condescending judgment of career choices.
suggested_rewrite: Content creation is competitive and not everyone will succeed. It's important to have a backup plan while pursuing creative careers.

input_text: I tell you ah, the guard at my condo, everyday sleep in the booth. Pay him for what? Might as well put a cardboard cutout.
reason: Mocks condo security guard as useless, comparing him to a cardboard cutout. Dehumanizing sarcasm.
suggested_rewrite: The security guard at my condo is often seen sleeping on duty. Management should ensure guards are alert for residents' safety.

input_text: People from that kampung area drive into the city, don't know roundabout rules also dare to horn people. So annoying.
reason: Stereotypes rural drivers as ignorant of city traffic rules. Rude with mild urban-rural divide undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Some drivers unfamiliar with city roundabout rules can cause confusion. Better road signage and driver education would help.

input_text: So many people open bubble tea shop also fail still want to try. Like sheep only, follow trend blindly then cry when bankrupt.
reason: Dismissive mockery of small business owners following trends. Condescending 'sheep' comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Starting a bubble tea business in a saturated market is risky. Aspiring entrepreneurs should research the market carefully before investing.

input_text: Auntie at kopitiam scold me for sitting too long. Hello, I paid for my drink already la. Customer always wrong in Malaysia is it?
reason: Rude complaint about kopitiam auntie with sarcastic generalization about Malaysian service culture.
suggested_rewrite: A kopitiam vendor asked me to leave after finishing my drink. Clear seating policies would help avoid misunderstandings.

input_text: 小孩的学校老师教学质量很差，教了等于没教。花那么多钱读华小结果这种水平。
reason: Dismissive attack on Chinese school teacher quality. Implies ethnic school type underperforming with rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: 孩子学校的教学质量有待提升。希望校方能重视师资培训，提高教学水平。

input_text: 去政府部门办事真的要命，排队两个小时，到了柜台那个人还在慢慢来，急死人。
reason: Rude complaint about government counter staff being slow. Dismissive of public servants with frustrated tone.
suggested_rewrite: 在政府部门排队很久，柜台服务效率有待提高。希望能增加人手或改善流程。

input_text: 隔壁邻居每天半夜唱K，吵到我们睡不着。这种人真的没公德心，不知道怎么教出来的。
reason: Insults neighbor's upbringing over noise complaint. Rude personal attack extending to their family.
suggested_rewrite: 隔壁邻居经常深夜唱卡拉OK影响休息。希望管理层能制定噪音管制规则。

input_text: 现在的年轻人读完大学就去做grab，浪费父母的钱。选什么科系不好偏偏选没用的。
reason: Dismissive judgment of young graduates doing gig work. Shames career choices and course selections.
suggested_rewrite: 一些大学毕业生暂时从事送餐工作。大学应加强职业规划辅导，帮助学生做更好的选择。

input_text: 公寓管理处太过分了，水管漏了一个星期还没人来修，管理费交来干嘛的？
reason: Sarcastic complaint about condo management ignoring water leak for a week. Rude questioning of management fee usage.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓水管漏了一周还未维修。希望管理处尽快处理，并说明管理费的使用情况。

input_text: 那个车祸的骑士也是活该，不戴头盔还超速，出了事才来怪别人。
reason: Victim-blaming motorcyclist in accident for not wearing helmet. Dismissive 'serves them right' attitude.
suggested_rewrite: 骑士不戴头盔超速确实危险。希望大家重视交通安全，减少意外发生。

input_text: 国民学校水平越来越差，连基本的数学都教不好。难怪大家都想送孩子去私立学校。
reason: Dismissive of national school quality with undertone of communal educational preference. Provocative comparison.
suggested_rewrite: 国民学校的教学质量需要提升。希望教育部能加强师资和课程质量，让家长对国民学校有信心。

input_text: 停车场那个收费员态度很差，好像我们欠他钱一样。这种服务态度怎么请进来的？
reason: Rude complaint about parking attendant's attitude. Questions hiring standards in dismissive manner.
suggested_rewrite: 停车场收费员的服务态度不太好。希望管理层能加强员工的客服培训。

input_text: 那些做直播卖东西的，一个个吵到要死，产品又不好。真不知道谁会买。
reason: Dismissive generalization about livestream sellers. Rude and condescending about an entire group of workers.
suggested_rewrite: 一些直播卖家过于喧闹且产品质量参差不齐。消费者应该谨慎选择。

input_text: 邻居的狗整天在走廊大小便，主人完全不管。这种人不配养宠物。
reason: Judges neighbor as unfit pet owner. Rude personal attack over pet hygiene issue.
suggested_rewrite: 邻居的狗经常在走廊排泄，影响公共卫生。希望宠物主人能负起清洁责任。

input_text: 快递员每次把包裹丢在门口就跑，东西坏了谁负责？这些人做事真的不用脑。
reason: Insults delivery workers as brainless. Rude generalization about courier service.
suggested_rewrite: 快递员经常把包裹随意放在门口。希望快递公司能改善派送流程，确保包裹安全。

input_text: 华小老师讲马来文那个口音真的听不下去，难怪孩子的BM成绩那么差。
reason: Mocks Chinese school teacher's Malay language pronunciation with ethnic undertone. Rude commentary on language ability.
suggested_rewrite: 华小的马来文教学质量需要提升。希望学校能聘请马来文能力更强的老师来提高学生成绩。

input_text: 这个condo的保安做事很马虎，登记也不看清楚就让人进来。安全感在哪里？
reason: Dismisses condo security as careless. Rude criticism of security personnel's competence.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓保安在访客登记方面不够严谨。管理层应加强保安培训以提升住户安全感。

input_text: 每次看到有人骑摩托不戴头盔出事故就说活该的，虽然不应该，但真的忍不住觉得是自己的错。
reason: Admits to victim-blaming motorcyclists not wearing helmets. Self-aware but still dismissive of victims.
suggested_rewrite: 不戴头盔骑摩托确实很危险，但出事故时我们应该表达关心而不是指责。安全教育很重要。

input_text: 这些condo的管理委员会只会收钱，做事就不会。每次开会都吵架，什么问题都解决不了。
reason: Dismisses condo management committee as money collectors who accomplish nothing. Rude and frustrated.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓管理委员会的会议效率有待提高。希望能更专注于解决居民关注的实际问题。

input_text: பள்ளிக்கூடத்தில் தமிழ் ஆசிரியர் சரியா கற்பிக்கிறதில்லை. ஒரு பயனும் இல்லை இந்த ஆசிரியர்களால்.
reason: Dismisses Tamil school teachers as useless. Rude parent complaint about teaching quality.
suggested_rewrite: பள்ளியில் தமிழ் கற்பித்தலின் தரம் மேம்பட வேண்டும். ஆசிரியர்களுக்கு கூடுதல் பயிற்சி தேவை.

input_text: அரசாங்க அலுவலகத்தில் வேலை செய்யுறவங்க எல்லாரும் சோம்பேறி. காலையில் வந்து டீ குடிச்சிட்டே இருக்காங்க.
reason: Labels all government office workers as lazy. Rude generalization and stereotype about public servants.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க அலுவலகங்களில் சேவை வேகம் அதிகரிக்க வேண்டும். ஊழியர்களின் உற்பத்தித்திறன் மேம்பட நடவடிக்கை தேவை.

input_text: பக்கத்து வீட்டுக்காரன் நடு ராத்திரியில் கூத்தடிக்கிறான். இப்படிப்பட்ட மனுஷன் கூட வாழ வேண்டியிருக்கு.
reason: Rude complaint about neighbor's late-night noise. Dismissive and frustrated tone about cohabitation.
suggested_rewrite: பக்கத்து வீட்டுக்காரர் நடு ராத்திரியில் சத்தம் போடுகிறார். நிர்வாகத்திடம் புகார் அளிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இளைஞர்கள் எல்லாரும் போன் பார்த்துக்கிட்டே இருக்காங்க, வேலை செய்ய மாட்டாங்க. இந்த தலைமுறை கெட்டுப்போச்சு.
reason: Dismissive generational attack on young people. Condemns entire generation as ruined. Condescending tone.
suggested_rewrite: சில இளைஞர்கள் தொலைபேசியில் அதிக நேரம் செலவிடுகிறார்கள். தொழில் திறன் பயிற்சி இதற்கு உதவும்.

input_text: கடையில் சாப்பாடு மோசமா இருந்தும் விலை ஏத்திட்டாங்க. இது கொள்ளையடிப்பு இல்லாம வேற என்ன.
reason: Accuses restaurant of robbery for high prices with poor food quality. Rude and exaggerated customer complaint.
suggested_rewrite: கடையின் உணவு தரம் குறைந்துள்ளது ஆனால் விலை அதிகரித்துள்ளது. வாடிக்கையாளர் திருப்தி முக்கியம்.

input_text: வண்டி ஓட்டுறவங்க signal போடாம திரும்புறாங்க. இவங்களுக்கு license எப்படி கொடுத்தாங்க?
reason: Rude dismissal of drivers who don't signal. Questions their licensing in condescending manner.
suggested_rewrite: சில வாகன ஓட்டிகள் signal பயன்படுத்தாமல் திரும்புகிறார்கள். போக்குவரத்து பாதுகாப்பு மேம்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: காண்டோ மேனேஜ்மென்ட் ஒரு காசுக்கும் உதவாது. லிப்ட் பழுது, parking சரியில்லை, ஆனா maintenance fee மட்டும் உயர்த்துவாங்க.
reason: Dismisses condo management as useless while fees increase. Sarcastic and frustrated tone.
suggested_rewrite: காண்டோ மேனேஜ்மென்ட் லிப்ட் மற்றும் parking பிரச்சனைகளை சரிசெய்ய வேண்டும். maintenance fee உயர்வுக்கு நியாயமான காரணம் தேவை.

input_text: இந்த காண்டோவில் யாருக்கும் பொது இடத்தை சுத்தமாக வைக்கணும்னு தெரியாது. குப்பையை எங்கயும் போடுறாங்க, கல்வி இல்லாதவங்க மாதிரி.
reason: Insults condo residents as uneducated for littering. Rude generalization about all residents.
suggested_rewrite: காண்டோவில் பொது இடங்களில் குப்பை பிரச்சனை உள்ளது. நிர்வாகம் விதிகளை கடுமையாக அமல்படுத்த வேண்டும்.

input_text: வேலையில்லாம house wife ஆ இருக்குறவங்க பிறகு complain பண்றாங்க money இல்லைன்னு. யாரு சொன்னா வேலைக்கு போகாதேன்னு?
reason: Dismissive and rude judgment of housewives who face financial difficulties. Victim-blaming tone.
suggested_rewrite: வீட்டில் இருக்கும் தாய்மார்கள் நிதி சிக்கல்களை எதிர்கொள்கிறார்கள். அவர்களுக்கு ஆதரவும் பயிற்சி வாய்ப்புகளும் தேவை.

input_text: Mechanic tu confirm con me la. Simple oil change also charge RM200, ingat I tak tau harga market ke.
reason: Accuses mechanic of scamming with overcharge. Rude and accusatory customer complaint in mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: Mechanic tu charge RM200 untuk tukar minyak, rasa macam overpriced. I patut compare harga dan minta breakdown.

input_text: Bro kalau nak buat bisnes MLM, go ahead la tapi jangan drag kawan-kawan masuk. Annoying gila, semua orang dah avoid kau dah.
reason: Dismissive and rude commentary about friend's MLM business. Personal attack with social shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Kawan yang buat MLM patut hormati batasan. Jangan terlalu agresif ajak orang lain masuk sebab boleh rosakkan persahabatan.

input_text: Wahh driver Myvi potong I from left side then brake suddenly. Typical la. These people road bully also don't know.
reason: Stereotypes Myvi drivers and uses dismissive 'these people' generalization. Rude road rage complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu tu potong dari kiri dan brek mengejut, sangat bahaya. Perlu lebih penguatkuasaan terhadap pemanduan berbahaya.

input_text: School canteen jual nasi goreng RM5 for kids. Harga tu macam restaurant dah. Nak untung atas budak sekolah ke?
reason: Accuses school canteen of profiteering off children. Sarcastic mixed-language parent complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Harga nasi goreng RM5 di kantin sekolah rasa agak mahal untuk pelajar. Harap pihak sekolah boleh kawal harga kantin.

input_text: Grab driver bawak kereta macam ambulans tapi driving skill macam L license. Siap nak charge lebih sebab jalan jam. Cheh.
reason: Mocks Grab driver's skill and accuses of overcharging. Dismissive mixed-language insult.
suggested_rewrite: Pemandu Grab saya hari ini kurang mahir dan ada caj tambahan. Saya akan report melalui aplikasi untuk semakan.

input_text: Tamil school area tu confirm jam every morning. Ibu bapa double park macam jalan tu milik bapak dia.
reason: Identifies school by ethnic type in traffic complaint. Communal undertone with rude expression about parents.
suggested_rewrite: Kawasan sekolah tu sering jam pada waktu pagi. Ibu bapa patut elak double park demi keselamatan semua pengguna jalan.

input_text: Those people who do MLM then post inspirational quotes on social media like they are CEO. Delusional gila bro.
reason: Dismissive mockery of MLM participants' social media behavior. Rude and condescending mixed-language insult.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah orang dalam MLM mungkin terlalu yakin dalam pemasaran media sosial mereka. Penting untuk bersikap realistik.

input_text: Tamil area tu lagi la, double park everywhere then blame other people when kena saman. Like that also can.
reason: Identifies area by ethnic label in parking complaint. Communal stereotyping with dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking masalah serius di kawasan tu. Penguatkuasaan dan kesedaran pemandu perlu dipertingkat tanpa mengira kawasan.

input_text: Sekolah kebangsaan cikgu cakap BM je, anak I balik rumah English satu patah pun tak improve. What's the point?
reason: Dismissive of national school language medium with undertone about ethnic schooling preference. Rude parental frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Anak saya kurang berkembang dalam Bahasa Inggeris di sekolah kebangsaan. Harap kualiti pengajaran English boleh ditingkatkan.

input_text: பள்ளிக்கூடத்தில் canteen சாப்பாடு மோசம். விலை அதிகம் ஆனா quality இல்லை. பிள்ளைகளை ஏமாத்துறாங்க.
reason: Accuses school canteen of cheating children with poor food quality at high prices. Rude parent complaint.
suggested_rewrite: பள்ளி canteen உணவின் தரம் மற்றும் விலை குறித்து கவலை உள்ளது. பள்ளி நிர்வாகம் இதை கவனிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Abang delivery tu lambat gila bro, food dah sejuk. Lepas tu nak mintak tip lagi. Seriously ah?
reason: Rude complaint about late delivery in mixed Malay-English. Dismissive of delivery worker requesting tip.
suggested_rewrite: Delivery rider lambat dan makanan dah sejuk. Saya beri rating berdasarkan pengalaman sebenar.

input_text: Eh this condo guard always give attitude when I come back late. I live here la bro, bukan pencuri. Geram betul.
reason: Rude mixed-language complaint about condo security guard giving attitude to residents returning late.
suggested_rewrite: Guard condo agak strict bila saya balik lewat. Harap prosedur keselamatan boleh dilaksanakan dengan lebih mesra.

input_text: School WhatsApp group tu mak-mak semua drama queen la. Sikit-sikit nak escalate. Chill la aunties, it's just homework.
reason: Dismissive and condescending mixed-language comment about mothers in school WhatsApp group. Mocks their concerns.
suggested_rewrite: Ibu bapa di WhatsApp group sekolah kadang terlalu emosional. Perbincangan yang tenang lebih produktif.

input_text: Neighbour kat sebelah tu renovation tak habis-habis. Everyday drilling sampai I nak gila. Inconsiderate gila these people.
reason: Rude mixed-language complaint about neighbor's prolonged renovation. Dismissive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran sebelah buat renovation lama dan bunyi mengganggu. Harap boleh berbincang tentang waktu kerja yang sesuai.

input_text: Parking kat mall ni memang nightmare la bro. Orang ambil dua lot, security buat don't know. Apa guna ada guard?
reason: Rude mixed-language rant about mall parking and dismisses security guards as useless.
suggested_rewrite: Parking di mall ni selalu penuh dan ada yang ambil dua lot. Harap security boleh lebih proaktif menguruskan.

input_text: Hawker tu masak biasa je tapi harga naik every month. Kita complain dia marah pulak. Customer always wrong la in Malaysia kan?
reason: Sarcastic mixed-language complaint about hawker price increases and response to customer feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Harga makanan hawker meningkat tapi kualiti sama. Harap peniaga boleh terima maklum balas pelanggan dengan baik.
